test.name: Covid Json data

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=https://api.covid19api.com/, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

kw.name: Get Request
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED* Please use `GET On Session` instead.
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Get Request' is deprecated. Please use `GET On Session` instead.

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPSConnection object at 0x044D7508>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed')': /summary

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPSConnection object at 0x044D75F8>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed')': /summary

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPSConnection object at 0x044D76E8>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed')': /summary

ConnectionError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.covid19api.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /summary (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPSConnection object at 0x044D77D8>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed'))

kw.name: To Json
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED* Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.To Json' is deprecated. Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Dictionary Values
kw.doc: Returns values of the given ``dictionary`` as a list.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Exit For Loop If
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing for loop if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: List Should Contain Value
kw.doc: Fails if the ``value`` is not found from ``list``.

test.status: ConnectionError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.covid19api.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /summary (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPSConnection object at 0x044D77D8>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed'))

errors.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Get Request' is deprecated. Please use `GET On Session` instead.
